description: TypoKit Documentation Site - Comprehensive Starlight (Astro) docs site with auto-generated API reference via TypeDoc, deployed to GitHub Pages. Covers getting started, core concepts, guides, CLI reference, architecture, AI agent docs, contributing guide, and blog.

userStories.title: Initialize Starlight docs package in monorepo
userStories.description: As a framework developer, I need a Starlight (Astro) documentation site initialized at packages/docs/ so that docs live alongside code and can be built with Nx.
acceptanceCriteria: Create packages/docs/ directory with package.json (name: @typokit/docs) and scripts: dev, build, preview
Initialize Starlight with Astro (@astrojs/starlight) via npm create astro or manual setup
Create astro.config.mjs with site title 'TypoKit', social links (GitHub repo)
Create a default landing page at src/content/docs/index.mdx with a hero section containing tagline and description
Dark mode enabled (Starlight default)
Full-text search enabled (Starlight built-in Pagefind)
Site builds successfully with npm run build inside packages/docs/
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Configure Nx build target for docs package
userStories.description: As a framework developer, I need nx build docs and nx serve docs to work so the docs site integrates into the monorepo build pipeline.
acceptanceCriteria: project.json (or package.json nx config) created for packages/docs with build and serve targets
nx build docs runs the Astro build and produces output in packages/docs/dist/
nx serve docs starts the Starlight dev server on localhost:4321
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Configure sidebar navigation structure
userStories.description: As a documentation reader, I need a well-organized sidebar with sections for Getting Started, Core Concepts, Guides, CLI Reference, API Reference, Architecture, Contributing, AI Agents, and Blog.
acceptanceCriteria: Sidebar configured in astro.config.mjs with top-level sections: Getting Started, Core Concepts, Guides, CLI Reference, API Reference, Architecture, Contributing, AI Agents, Blog
Sidebar sections are collapsible
Create placeholder .mdx stub files for each section so the sidebar renders without broken links
Active page is highlighted in sidebar
Sidebar renders correctly on mobile (hamburger menu)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Configure GitHub Pages deployment workflow
userStories.description: As a framework developer, I need the docs site to auto-deploy to GitHub Pages on pushes to main so documentation is always current.
acceptanceCriteria: GitHub Actions workflow created at .github/workflows/docs.yml
Workflow triggers on push to main with paths filter: packages/docs/**, packages/*/src/**, typokit-arch.md
Workflow supports manual trigger (workflow_dispatch)
Workflow installs dependencies with pnpm, builds with nx build docs
Deploys packages/docs/dist/ to GitHub Pages using actions/upload-pages-artifact and actions/deploy-pages
Base URL configured correctly in astro.config.mjs for GitHub Pages
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Set up TypeDoc API reference generation
userStories.description: As a framework developer, I need API reference auto-generated from TSDoc/JSDoc comments in source code so API docs stay in sync with code.
acceptanceCriteria: Install starlight-typedoc plugin and typedoc as dependencies in packages/docs
Configure starlight-typedoc in astro.config.mjs with entryPoints pointing to all publishable @typokit/* package entry files
Generated API reference pages include exported interfaces, types, classes, functions with their JSDoc descriptions
Each package gets its own section in the API reference sidebar (e.g. API Reference > @typokit/core)
API reference regenerates on every build (no stale docs)
Links between types work correctly (e.g. ServerAdapter links to its full definition)
Site builds successfully with the TypeDoc integration
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Write Getting Started - Quickstart guide
userStories.description: As a new TypoKit user, I need a quickstart guide that takes me from zero to a running TypoKit app in under 5 minutes.
acceptanceCriteria: Page created at src/content/docs/getting-started/quickstart.mdx
Prerequisites listed: Node.js 24+, pnpm (recommended), npm/yarn supported
Step-by-step walkthrough: typokit init, project structure, define a type, create a route, run typokit dev, see it work
Includes terminal command blocks with expected output at each step
Links to deeper Core Concepts pages for further reading
Page renders correctly in Starlight
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Write Getting Started - Project Structure guide
userStories.description: As a new TypoKit user, I need a guide explaining the project structure generated by typokit init so I understand where to put my code.
acceptanceCriteria: Page created at src/content/docs/getting-started/project-structure.mdx
Explains @app/schema, @app/server, @app/db, @app/client package structure
Explains the .typokit/ generated directory and what each subdirectory contains (validators, routes, schemas, tests, client)
Explains typokit.config.ts configuration options
File tree diagram showing a typical project layout
Notes which files are auto-generated (never edit) vs user-maintained
Page renders correctly in Starlight
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Write Core Concept - Schema-First Types
userStories.description: As a TypoKit user, I need documentation explaining the schema-first type system so I understand how to define types that drive the entire stack.
acceptanceCriteria: Page created at src/content/docs/core-concepts/schema-first-types.mdx
Explains the philosophy: Write the type once - single TypeScript interface drives validation, DB schema, API docs, client types, test factories
Shows a complete entity type example with all supported JSDoc tags (@table, @id, @generated, @format, @unique, @minLength, @maxLength, @default, @onUpdate)
Explains derived types (Omit, Partial, Pick) for input/output contracts
Explains what the build step produces from a type (validators, JSON Schema, DDL, client types, test factories, diff report)
Includes a What NOT to do section (dont use Zod, decorators, or runtime schema libraries)
Page renders correctly in Starlight
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Write Core Concept - Routing and Handlers
userStories.description: As a TypoKit user, I need documentation explaining how to define route contracts and implement handlers so I can build API endpoints.
acceptanceCriteria: Page created at src/content/docs/core-concepts/routing.mdx
Explains RouteContract<TParams, TQuery, TBody, TResponse> with a full example
Explains defineHandlers<TRoutes>() with typed handler implementation example
Explains the file convention: contracts.ts, handlers.ts, middleware.ts per route module
Explains explicit route registration in app.ts (no magic file-based routing)
Shows how route params, query, and body are automatically typed and validated
Page renders correctly in Starlight
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Write Core Concept - Middleware and Context
userStories.description: As a TypoKit user, I need documentation explaining middleware and context type narrowing so I can add authentication, logging, and other cross-cutting concerns.
acceptanceCriteria: Page created at src/content/docs/core-concepts/middleware.mdx
Explains defineMiddleware<TContext>() and how middleware transforms the context type
Shows the authentication middleware example with context type narrowing
Explains middleware priority ordering and short-circuiting (throwing errors to stop the chain)
Explains ctx.fail(), ctx.log, and ctx.services
Distinguishes TypoKit typed middleware from framework-native middleware (CORS, compression)
Page renders correctly in Starlight
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Write Core Concept - Error Handling
userStories.description: As a TypoKit user, I need documentation explaining the error handling system so I know how to throw and handle errors correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Page created at src/content/docs/core-concepts/error-handling.mdx
Explains the philosophy: thrown errors over Result types with rationale
Documents the AppError class hierarchy (NotFoundError, ValidationError, UnauthorizedError, ForbiddenError, ConflictError)
Shows ctx.fail() usage as syntactic sugar
Explains the built-in error middleware (auto-serialization to ErrorResponse)
Explains dev mode vs production mode error detail behavior
Shows the structured error JSON format with traceId, route, phase, failures, sourceFile, schemaFile, relatedTests
Page renders correctly in Starlight
Typecheck passes

Documents the ownership boundary table (what TypoKit owns vs what the adapter owns)

Shows usage examples for: native server, Fastify, Hono, Express
Explains when to use native vs bring-your-own

Page renders correctly in Starlight
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Write Core Concept - Database Adapters
userStories.description: As a TypoKit user, I need documentation explaining the database adapter system so I can connect my TypoKit types to my preferred database tool.
acceptanceCriteria: Page created at src/content/docs/core-concepts/database-adapters.mdx
Explains the philosophy: Generate types, not queries - TypoKit is not an ORM
Documents all four adapters: Drizzle, Kysely, Prisma, raw SQL with a comparison table
Shows the DatabaseAdapter interface
Shows example output for each adapter (Drizzle table definition, Kysely types, Prisma schema, raw SQL DDL)
Explains migration philosophy: generated as drafts, never auto-applied
Page renders correctly in Starlight
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Write Core Concept - Plugins
userStories.description: As a TypoKit user, I need documentation explaining the plugin system so I can extend TypoKit with WebSocket support, debug tooling, or custom extensions.

Shows plugin registration in createApp()
Documents the official plugins: @typokit/plugin-debug and @typokit/plugin-ws
Explains why there are no onRequest/onResponse hooks (plugins register middleware instead)

Typecheck passes

Documents auto-generated contract tests with an example showing generated test code

Typecheck passes
